zh.lifeSummary: 當Hannah Brooks於大約1626年出生在英國素福爾可時，她的父親Henry Brooks35歲，母親Mrs. Henry Brooks32歲。她於1647年10月13日與Thomas Fox在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可康可德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1691年2月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德享年66歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hannah Brooks于大约1626年出生在英国素福爾可时，她的父亲Henry Brooks35岁，母亲Mrs. Henry Brooks32岁。她于1647年10月13日与Thomas Fox在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可康可德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1691年2月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德享年66岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德。

nameMeanings.name: Brooks
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: usually a variant of Brook , with excrescent -s. The optional addition of -s, with no grammatical function, is usually post-medieval, but some examples of the same person's name occurring with and without -(e)s have been noted as early as the 14th century in South Lancashire. The -es in such cases probably has neither a plural nor a genitival function, and the name means ‘dweller at the brook’, not ‘dweller at the brooks’. A plural sense cannot be ruled out elsewhere, but a non-grammatical -(e)s must also be considered a strong possibility.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Brucks
meanings: probably a habitational name from Brucks (also Brux) which derives from Middle Low German brōk ‘low-lying marsh’.
reportedly also an altered form of Flemish (Dutch) Broex, an old variant of Broeks (see Brooks ).

variants.name: Brook
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a brook, stream, water-meadows or low, marshy ground, from Middle English brook, Old English brōc ‘brook, stream’; or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, such as Brook (Kent, Rutland) or Brooke (Norfolk).
North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a water meadow or marsh, from Low German brook (cognate with German Bruch ‘swamp’ and Old English brōc; see 1 above).
Americanized form of Dutch Broek: topographic name from broek, a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: Hannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

variants.name: Hanna
meanings: Either the biblical name ( see Hannah ) or a short form of Johanna .

variants.name: Hana
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Hannah Brooks was born about 1626, in Suffolk, England, her father, Henry Brooks, was 35 and her mother, Mrs. Henry Brooks, was 32. She married Thomas Fox on 13 October 1647, in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 14 February 1691, in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 66, and was buried in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hannah Brooks est née environ 1626, à Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Henry Brooks, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Henry Brooks, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Fox le 13 octobre 1647, à Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 février 1691, à Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hannah Brooks um 1626 in Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Brooks 35 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Henry Brooks 32. Sie hat am 13. Oktober 1647 in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten Thomas Fox geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. Februar 1691 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Brooks è nata il circa 1626 nel Suffolk, England, sua padre, Henry Brooks, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Henry Brooks, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Fox il 13 ottobre 1647, nel Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 14 febbraio 1691, nel Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Hannah Brooksが約1626年にイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Henry Brooksは35歳，母Mrs. Henry Brooksは32歳であった。1647年10月13日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスコンコルドでThomas Foxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1691年2月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスコンコルドで66歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスコンコルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hannah Brooks(이)가 대략 1626년 영국 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Brooks(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Henry Brooks(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1647년 10월 13일 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 콘코르드에서 Thomas Fox(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1691년 2월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 콘코르드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 콘코르드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Brooks nasceu aproximadamente 1626, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Brooks, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Henry Brooks, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Fox em 13 de outubro de 1647, em Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1691, em Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hannah Brooks родилась около 1626 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Brooks было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Henry Brooks, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Fox 13 октября 1647 г. в местности конкорд, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 14 февраля 1691 г. в местности конкорд, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности конкорд, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hannah Brooks nació aproximadamente 1626, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Brooks, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Mrs. Henry Brooks, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Thomas Fox el 13 de octubre de 1647, en Concord, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 14 de febrero de 1691, en Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
